name: Akaso Waterproof Case for Brave 8
description: Capture underwater wonders with your Brave 8 action camera using this Waterproof Case from AKASO. This housing offers protection against cold, dust, mud, and debris as you dive underwater at depths to 40m.

features.Key Features:: Waterproof Case Underwater Housing for AKASO Action Camera. | Delivers maximum image sharpness above and below water. | Waterproof up to 30m-40m. | Adopted high light transmittance material,it will not affect photography effect. | It included: Anti-fog
